title: contact_set: mixed recognized+unrecognized keys silently drops unknown keys
description: Trigger: PATCH {"blocked":true, "unknownField":"x"} on an existing contact. blocked is processed (any_update=true), unknownField has no handler, id goes into updated. The unknownField write is silently dropped. The empty/unknown-only check (added in this diff) only fires when any_update is false, so mixed patches bypass it. RFC 8620 §7.1 is ambiguous on this — some servers ignore unknown keys — but the intent of the new invalidProperties handling is clearly to reject them.
